mapper.select: select distinct m.perm_key from un_module_member mb join un_module_role_menu_perm rp on rp.system_id = mb.system_id and rp.tenant_id = mb.tenant_id and rp.app_id = mb.app_id and rp.role_id = mb.role_id and rp.perm_level = 1 join un_module_menu m on m.id = rp.menu_id and m.app_id = mb.app_id where mb.system_id = #{systemId} and mb.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and mb.plat_id = #{platId} and mb.status = 1 and m.perm_key is not null and m.perm_key <> ''
